message:
test(cell,term): add 42 unit tests for image types and dimension validation (wa-5jxyo)

Add comprehensive tests for TextureCoordinate, ImageCell, ImageDataType,
ImageData, PlacementInfo, ImageAttachStyle, check_image_dimensions, and
one_or_zero covering construction, getters, equality, hashing, cloning,
debug formatting, and boundary conditions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
